name: Veal Valdostana
recipeInstructions:
Garnish: 8 lemon wedges
Spread bread crumbs on a sheet of wax paper or a paper plate; set aside. In a bowl combine flour, salt, and pepper; dredge cutlets in flour, coating all sides. Dip each cutlet into beaten egg, then into bread crumbs, thoroughly coating all sides. In a 12-inch nonstick skillet heat margarine over medium heat until hot and bubbly; add cutlets and brown on both sides. Transfer cutlets to jelly-roll pan or cookie sheet; top each with 1 ounce cheese and broil just until cheese melts. Serve each portion garnished with 2 lemon wedges.
Makes 4 servings.
